name: rainpane
description: Ambient focus overlay prototype with procedural rain, fog, and droplets.
author: Rainpane

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
scripts.package: npm run generate:icons && npm run clean:electron-xattrs && npm run build && electron-builder --dir --config.directories.output=/tmp/rainpane-release
scripts.dist:mac: npm run generate:icons && npm run clean:electron-xattrs && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --config.directories.output=/tmp/rainpane-release
scripts.dist:win: npm run generate:icons && npm run build && electron-builder --win zip --x64
scripts.dist:win:arm64: npm run generate:icons && npm run build && electron-builder --win zip --arm64
